arts.ttl: Juventus consider young prospects Lacroix and Hato for defence
arts.sum: Reports from Italy suggest that following Gleison Bremer’s injury, Juventus are not rushing to sign a free agent as an immediate replacement. The Brazilian international has sustained an ACL injury, ruling him out for the remainder of the season. Rather than look to secure a free-agent deal, the club plan to wait until the January transfer window while relying on Federico Gatti and Pierre Kalulu, with Danilo and Juan Cabal as backup options. The goal is to target reliable players with potential for the future.
